description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, multi-story brick building with a flat, concrete roof. The facade features large, industrial-style windows arranged in horizontal rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The brickwork is a mix of reddish and dark brown tones, giving the structure a weathered, utilitarian appearance. Metal doors are present on one end, likely serving as a main entry or loading access, while the other end is windowed but lacks visible doors. The upper section of the walls includes a band of smaller, continuous windows just below the roofline, enhancing the industrial aesthetic. The overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and durability.
description: A rectangular brick warehouse with large industrial windows, a flat concrete roof, and metal entry doors. The design is utilitarian and functional, with weathered brickwork and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: End view showing a brick wall with two large windows and a continuous band of smaller windows near the roof; no visible doors.
description_view_1: Long side view displaying three rows of large industrial windows set in brickwork, with a continuous strip of smaller windows just below the flat roof.
description_view_2: Opposite end view featuring a brick wall with a set of metal double doors and a large window above, plus a band of smaller windows near the roof.
description_view_3: Long side view similar to view 1, with large industrial windows in rows and a continuous upper strip of smaller windows, but with subtle differences in window arrangement.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is constructed of weathered red and brown brick, featuring large, rectangular industrial windows arranged in horizontal rows. A continuous band of smaller windows runs just below the flat roof, and metal doors are present on one end, emphasizing a functional, utilitarian design.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and appears to be made of concrete, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop structures. Its plain, unadorned surface reinforces the utilitarian character of the building.
